tracks.meaning: an agreement or arrangement, especially a commercial transaction between parties
a distribution of cards or a specified arrangement in card games or gambling
the distribution of playing cards to players at the start of a game
to distribute or give out something to multiple recipients
an agreement or settlement, particularly one that resolves a dispute
treatment or handling, especially in the phrase 'a good deal' or 'a raw deal'
to manage or cope with a difficult situation or emotional challenge
to address or discuss a particular topic or issue
